name: obsidian-mcp
description: AI-driven knowledge management for Obsidian vaults. 27 tools for notes, search, frontmatter, tags, folders, graph analysis, templates, auto-backlinking, and dataview queries.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: API key from Obsidian Local REST API plugin (optional — enables live features)

cache_interval.title: Cache Refresh (minutes)
cache_interval.description: How often to refresh vault cache (0 to disable)

tools.name: read_note
tools.description: Read the content of a note including frontmatter

tools.name: read_multiple_notes
tools.description: Read multiple notes at once

tools.name: write_note
tools.description: Create or overwrite a note with content and optional frontmatter

tools.name: patch_note
tools.description: Find and replace text in a note

tools.name: insert_at
tools.description: Insert content at a specific heading or block ID

tools.name: delete_note
tools.description: Delete a note (requires confirmation)

tools.name: move_note
tools.description: Move/rename a note

tools.name: move_file
tools.description: Move/rename any file (requires double confirmation)

tools.name: search_vault
tools.description: Search notes with BM25 ranking

tools.name: query_notes
tools.description: Query notes by frontmatter using dataview syntax

tools.name: get_frontmatter
tools.description: Get YAML frontmatter of a note

tools.name: update_frontmatter
tools.description: Update frontmatter fields

tools.name: manage_tags
tools.description: Add, remove, or list tags

tools.name: get_notes_info
tools.description: Get metadata for one or more notes

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List files and folders in a directory

tools.name: manage_folder
tools.description: Create, rename, or delete a folder

tools.name: get_vault_stats
tools.description: Get vault statistics

tools.name: get_vault_structure
tools.description: Get recursive directory tree

tools.name: get_backlinks
tools.description: Get notes that link to a given note

tools.name: get_outgoing_links
tools.description: Get notes that a given note links to

tools.name: find_orphan_notes
tools.description: Find notes with no links

tools.name: auto_backlink
tools.description: Find and convert note name mentions to wikilinks

tools.name: create_from_template
tools.description: Create a note from a template

tools.name: list_attachments
tools.description: List non-markdown attachments

tools.name: get_attachment_info
tools.description: Get attachment metadata and referencing notes

tools.name: get_active_note
tools.description: Get currently active note (requires REST API)

tools.name: get_periodic_note
tools.description: Get periodic note (requires REST API)
